PAGE.TITLE: Login to your account
PAGE.SUBTITLE: Enter your email below to login to your account.

BLOCKED_ACCOUNT.TITLE: Your sign-in was blocked
BLOCKED_ACCOUNT.MESSAGE: Your account has been blocked after multiple consecutive login attempts.
BLOCKED_ACCOUNT.EMAIL_SENT: We've sent you a notification via email with instructions on how to unblock it.

RESET_PASSWORD.TITLE: Reset your password
RESET_PASSWORD.SUBTITLE: Type your email address to send instructions to reset your password to you inbox.

ERRORS.EMAIL_NOT_FOUND: This email does not exist in our database.

CHECK_INBOX.TITLE: Check your inbox
CHECK_INBOX.MESSAGE: We've sent you an email to [email]. Follow the instructions to access your account.

PROFILE.TITLE: Profile
PROFILE.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your updates have been saved successfully.

PASSWORD.TITLE: Password
PASSWORD.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your password has been changed successfully.
PASSWORD.REQUIREMENTS: Your new password must contain at least

CUSTOMIZATION.TITLE: Customization
CUSTOMIZATION.LANGUAGE_DESCRIPTION: This is the language that will be used in the dashboard.
CUSTOMIZATION.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your preferences have been saved successfully.

ERRORS.FIELD_REQUIRED: This field cannot be left blank.
ERRORS.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 10 characters long.
ERRORS.PASSWORD_NO_LETTER: Password must contain at least 1 letter.
ERRORS.PASSWORD_NO_NUMBER_SPECIAL: Password must contain at least 1 number or special character.

UNSAVED_CHANGES.TITLE: Unsaved Changes
UNSAVED_CHANGES.MESSAGE: You have unsaved changes. If you leave now, your latest updates will be lost.
